description: Outstanding! Making a change in software is always a stress, particularly when the change effects literally every member of staff. Rotaready were there to support us every step of the way during the migration from our old system. Data transfer, training and implementation were all supported by their team. We have been live for over two years and we would not move away from it. Our old system could not provide the functionality we needed, it took ages to turn the data into any meaningful reporting and was time intensive. Staff love the easy of use, from shift swapping to booking annual leave, its all so easy for them. Moving to Rotaready gave us an easy to use system which was quickly adopted by all users, saved us time and money and also allowed us to reduce our operational staffing costs by exposing labour efficiencies. Thanks Roatready - you might just have saved my life!
author: Daniel E.
pros: We love the way that the software is so instinctive and simple to use - this goes for our staff and managers, who all adopted it with ease. As managers we love the visibility the product gives is across a range of metrics. Costs, hours used, attendance monitoring and custom reports all make our business easier to run.
cons: Initially the reporting functionality was quite limited, but the guys at Rotaready have worked hard on this to give a range of standard reports and customisable ones which help to extract useful info from the software which we have used to make operational changes in the business. I know they are constantly working on this aspect of the platform which is great for us.

description: Team are really responsive and helpful. Helping with any issues or requests in a prompt and helpful manner
author: Rob L.
pros: I love the split in hours for front of house and kitchen allowing us to pinpoint where we are over spending on hours
cons: Would be good if the actual hours once signed off showed on the rota so we can see actual start/finish times straight from the rota but that would just be a preference for myself for quick review

description: Very disappointed. We were expecting a pleasant user experience being able to manage our rotas, holidays and other abscence with ease as well as gaining valuable management information on staff productivity and other KPI's; unfortunately Rota Ready has failed in all but first of these; at best it's a useful rota management and clocking on tool. However for ease of use in providing management information it's appaling and over complicated.
author: Arran N.
pros: Pricing was competitive, features and integration with POS systems looked useful.
cons: Rota Ready tries to be too many things to too many people and for a small independent business it fails miserably in terms of it's ease of use for managemnt purposes; while the functionality may all be there it is over complicated (or perhaps just poorly designed?) to the point where nothing is easy; expect to invest a considerable amount of time exchanging texts with the online support team; nothing about Rota Ready is intuitive and everything requires expert working knowledge to set up and or understand. Finally featuresyou would expect either don't exist or simply don't work as you would expect!

description: Great, the team are responsive to support emails.
author: Greg G.
pros: Features and easy to run payroll downloads, the team app is intuitive and easy to use. Clock in-out feature is great. Lots of customisations.
cons: Cannot phone anyone for support, frequent glitches and no square integration is very painful. The payroll exports don;t calculate the holiday pay, just shows the hours and rate, however, it does for usual hours, which makes no sense.

description: Our experience with RotaReady has been smooth and enlightening from the beginning. We took the decision to move aways from written Rotas and timesheets and find a more controlled and overlooked system to integrate into our businesses. We found RotaReady covered all our needs between the 3 companies and the separate departments. [sensitive content hidden] took us through demo, reassuring us and answering our questions, this was followed by [sensitive content hidden] whom helped us set up, train and guide our management team through the bespoke system. The whole team has been able to answer any question on hand.
author: Emma D.
pros: The communication has always been quick and effective. The use of Chat on the website is very helpful. They work well with us and have plenty of time for our employees.
cons: Not a Con but more payroll software integrations and reports would be helpful, even a customizable report option to create our own.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: A very intricate, complex system that offers employee and employers an excellent experience.
author: Nico L.
pros: The mapping system for every labour stream, the timesheet system and the payroll export that fully integrates with Brightpay. Another thing I really like is the fast support through the integrated chat.
cons: Sometimes the clocking in and out system can be tedious in the back end, but that can be improved.

review_title: A more streamlined way to work!
description: Overall very positive and I can see the potential it has once we're using it more effectively.
author: Harriet T.
pros: I like the flexibility it affords us and the managers. I really enjoy being able to see who is working at each venue with ease, and the feedback from our managers over the ease of use has been great.
cons: It is quite 'glitchy' at times and will come up with error warnings frequently- it's not always easy to identify what you've done wrong. It is also sometimes hard to track the progress of some of the bigger 'tickets' i've raised, and things take a while to be resolved. For example- I have been trying to add in a new leave type since we went live, and I have been trying to amend this contract for a few months and it takes a lot of chasing.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best web based HR product on the market
description: Excellent from start to finish, from implementation and initial training to on going support. The staff love it.
author: James B.
pros: The product has revolutionised our staff management, cost control and HR paperwork to such a simple process. The app for the Staff is handy and concise and provides all the information they need which has reduced trivial requests no end. The team at Rotaready offer speedy and excellent service to guide you through the product so you get the maximum usage.
cons: I have failed to find an aspect that I would categorise as a con

review_title: Good system with accurate recording of sales vrs labour
description: Other than starting technical issues, its a good system to use and much better than our previous system.
author: Lindsey A.
pros: Once rota ready is set up the system is quite easy to use. It give accurate sales vrs labour forecasts and actuals.
cons: When the set up is completed initially - more face to face training would be an advantage (as with most new systems)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Rotaready will help you with everything, any questions we have get answered really quickly. So easy to use.
author: Sam R.
pros: Rotaready makes life so much easier for doing our payroll…it’s easy to use and saves time.
cons: There’s nothing I don’t like about Rotaready

description: Customer Service is exceptional. The team are very quick with their response emails. We have yet to come across an issue that cannot be solved. The team have worked tirelessly with us to get our unusual shift patterns to work within the entire company. We have definitely set some challenges for the RotaReady team, and they have come up trumps every time.
author: Samantha R.
pros: We use scheduling for our Rota's. Once we got to grips with how it works, it has been a dream to implement, maintain and manage. We use the HR function and upload all documents into folders designed for us. Swapping and changing daily rotas is as simple as click and drag. We are able to add additional pay rates to different shift patterns.
cons: No fire role call function. User to be able to cancel holiday. The ability to amend holiday/time off without cancelling it. We have to run many different reports to get the information we require before we can run payroll, but that is our unique way of working rather than RotaReady function error.

description: Use it everyday and enjoy this.
author: Wil F.
pros: Simple to use, effective, staff like the platform and the customer support is brilliant.
cons: I don't believe there is anything that I dislike or believe that are missing.

description: I have worked with Rotaready for over a year, and everything is excellent. Their customer service is fantastic, as they are always there to help out or answer any of my questions.
author: Carlos C.
pros: Simple, powerful and comprehensive HR system to work with.
cons: So far, it's been a great platform. If there is any issue, their teams get it solved.

author: Iolanda M.
pros: It has all the features you need to plan, monitor, adjust both rota and cost control.
cons: I would love to see a clearer wage cost calculation.

review_title: One of the better packages on the market available today
description: pretty seemless. dont have much to complain about. a good essential to any running business.
author: Chris S.
pros: great integration with other platforms, lots of metrics and data. allows me to run a business without needing to be there constantly great phone app for staff allowing them easier access
cons: would like to see a few updates regarding allowing pople to clock out for smoke breaks with the press of a button (a variable 10 minute break button perhaps)

author: Joanne M.
pros: Our restaurant have just started using Rotaready after having done it manually for years! This has made my job so much easier and faster.
cons: There is a bit of a learning curve to the system but once you learn it is easy enough.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: RotaReady: Does exactly what it says on the tin...
description: From start to finish, the team at RotaReady are informative and helpful
author: John W.
pros: Ease of use, flexibilityCustomer support & training
cons: Would like to be able to set up email notifications for holiday requests rather than relying on just the App

description: Scheduling shifts is easy, froecasting allows us to put staff where they are needed.Recording of staff hours (200 staff) with ease.Oversight of wage and sales percentages form operations level.We have recently moved our online training to a new platform who have integrated with RR with ease.
author: Gerrard B.
pros: Ease on boarding, hour recording and export for payroll.
cons: Ease of how to record sickness and lateness in real time.

review_title: A great product supported by a great team!
description: We transitioned from another rota management platform during COVID. The RotaReady team helped with making the process as smooth as possible. The team at RotaReady are always receptive to the introduction of new ideas providing a path towards bringing new features to the platform. Over the past two years, the improvements have been significant. It's worth point out that support for issues is always a must when choosing these products. I have found the RotaReady team always available to help. The chat function in particular is great, you're not just talking to a bot! It makes a big difference when they want to solve the issues as quickly as possible. Overall, a really good product that always continues to improve. The support is just as important and they do a great job of making this as easy as possible.
author: Minesh S.
pros: The team are really receptive of new processes and ideas. They look at ways to implement these and will provide a clear guideline to when these are coming. Love the chat function, the team are quick and helpful. It helps resolve issues very quickly.
cons: The clocking in and out. When an employee leaves significantly earlier than the shift pattern suggests. The system does not flag it as an issue. Shift swapping isn't as clear as it could be. The clocking in app on the tablet still needs some work.

review_title: Staff Rota Software and so much more
description: Making changes in any company can be daunting at first but the training and support we received was second to none, and still is. [sensitive content hidden] at Rotaready has always been excellent at responding to any of our queries and requests. Her knowledge of the system is outstanding and I always know she will respond quickly.
author: Nicki H.
pros: The ease of building rotas is fantastic. Monitoring hours and optimizing's wage spend is a great benefit that can assist with wage cost. The payroll facility is by far the easiest and simplest system I have used, saving hours of time.
cons: We don't really see any cons to the Rotaready system. I'm impressed by its simplicity and user friendliness.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Really good overall rotaready is definitely better then other companies offering similar products with in the same market.
author: Simon D.
pros: The customer is clear and very helpful and the fact you speak or live chat with the same people make it easer and quicker.
cons: As the owner email notification of holiday on senior key member would help me understand the skill level with the sites in their absence.

author: Beatriz S.
pros: I like the user face, is simple and easy to access. Training new manager sis quick and that is critical for onboarding.
cons: Lack of notifications that can be helpful to track conduct or performance. I would like to have a trigger point for absence or flatness for employees, allowing managers to complete absence reviews a lot faster without having to complete manual reports for all.

description: Overall the service we receive is good and the support team are quick to answer any questions we have
author: Jess E.
pros: It’s easy to use Access to all sites in one place
cons: Clocking in/out doesn’t always work The accuracy of the cost control in terms of the wages

review_title: Excellent System With a Team Who Take Feedback On Board & Develop Accordingly
description: Wage Costing was a huge challenge for us, we now have full control of this and each Head of Department can see and manage their own budget and schedule accordingly. Additionally, an unexpected bonus is that Heads of Department now have easy access to all colleague telephone numbers and the ability to offer out cover shifts to the team at the touch of a button which has made a huge difference to efficiency.
author: Nicola H.
pros: We like the fact that the system is intuitive to use and that all of our information is contained in one place. Rotas are simple to create and there are different ways to do this, in order to suit varying businesses or departments. The ability to access the software remotely has also been key, giving Heads of Department the peace of mind to know that they can log in and make amendments and monitor costs when away from the business. Most of all it has given us overall control, excellent reporting detail and the ability to see who is expected where across the whole business. Payroll release has never been simpler!
cons: The product is so simple to use, I have worked with other Time & Attendance systems which are nowhere near as simple and intuitive as RotaReady. There are some items on our wish list for future development but we've found that if you speak to the team they're always willing to consider developing new features depending on demand.

author: Jacob J.
pros: The setup through to the day to day use is very easy to use and logical. Supported throughout! Great Product!
cons: Management of SSP documentation as standard would be useful.
